tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$110 est. (-0.5%); WTI ~$113 confirmed (CNBC TV18 Apr 7; tested $115 Apr 6 as US crude premium surges). Tehran Toll Booth active; 15 US soldiers injured Kuwait (J.Post). IDF strikes Asaluyeh petrochemical complex + kills IRGC intel chief Khademi. IRGC blocks 2 Qatari LNG tankers despite existing agreement (Reuters Apr 6). Apr 7 8pm ET deadline final; Iran 10-clause proposal rejected. Tail risk 56%. Stress $105-135/bbl; tail $160-185/bbl on Kharg seizure. PTTEP and Medco cleanest ASEAN equity beta.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$111 est. (Apr 7, CNBC TV18 early, near four-year highs); iTraxx Asia IG est. ~198bp (+3bp). ASEAN Energy Equities +0.6%; ASEAN Banks -0.8% on spread widening. 15 US soldiers injured in Kuwait Apr 6 (J.Post) - escalation deepening; IDF strikes Iran's largest facility. Apr 7 8pm ET deadline final; Iran proposal rejected. Tail risk 56% validates energy long / bank underweight. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire and commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 58.90 (Apr 7, +0.2%; slight weakening as deadline anxiety outweighs bilateral deal). Philippines bilateral toll-free Hormuz deal persists, but Brent ~$111 est. still ~$41/bbl above import cost assumption; JKM ~$21.80/MMBtu est. 15 US soldiers injured in Kuwait Apr 6; Apr 7 8pm ET deadline final; tail risk 56%. PHP bilateral-deal cushion erodes as Gulf escalation broadens; stress target 61.00-62.00 intact; bilateral deal does not resolve fundamental oil import deficit.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR est. 16,890 (Apr 7, +0.2% IDR continuing to weaken). Brent ~$111 est. still $41/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 7.30% (+5bp). 15 US soldiers injured in Kuwait Apr 6; IDF strikes Iran's largest facility; Apr 7 8pm ET deadline final; tail risk 56%. Indonesia not on Iran 'friendly nations' list - full toll exposure. Stress target 17,200-17,800; tail target 18,000+. Tehran Toll Booth active; subsidy deficit structural. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Apr 6
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~198bp (+3bp Apr 7); ASEAN HY est. ~578bp (+8bp). Tehran Toll Booth P&I restoration structurally impossible; tail risk 56%. 15 US soldiers injured in Kuwait Apr 6 (J.Post) + IDF strikes Iran's largest facility confirm active multi-front escalation. IRGC cyberattack threat on US tech firms still live. 215-230bp becomes the post-Apr 7 event-risk target if Kharg strikes proceed; Saudi output-cut risk from Kuwait/UAE attacks adds systemic upside. Hold CDS protection; Apr 7 8pm ET deadline is the binary trigger tonight.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Apr 6 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$21.80/MMBtu est. (+3.8% Apr 7); TTF ~€53.50/MWh est. (+2.1%). IRGC blocks 2 Qatari LNG tankers at Hormuz despite Iran-US transit agreement (Reuters Apr 6) - signals Iran not honoring deals; JKM spot supply tightening. IDF strikes Asaluyeh petrochemical complex (South Pars-linked) disrupts associated condensate/gas flows. Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked. Apr 7 8pm ET deadline is binary trigger tonight. JKM upside target $24-28/MMBtu on Kharg escalation; stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart and commercial Hormuz reopening.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~198bp; ASEAN HY est. ~578bp - spread widening on US soldier injuries + IDF facility strikes. Apr 7 8pm ET deadline tonight; tail risk 56%. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - tonight's binary outcome is the last pre-strike window.

PTTEP: THB window closed - TH 10Y est. 2.31% (+3bp Apr 7); USD/THB est. 33.75 (+0.1% mild risk-off). Brent ~$111 est. boosts upstream EBITDA by $41/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$21.80/MMBtu est. 15 US soldiers injured in Kuwait Apr 6; IDF strikes Iran's largest facility; Apr 7 8pm ET deadline tonight. Execute H2 2026 prefunding via USD market now - THB opportunity closed; Gulf JV toll compliance review urgent.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent ~$111 est. and JKM ~$21.80 est. structurally elevated; USD/SGD est. 1.2885 (Apr 7, slight USD strength). iTraxx Asia IG est. ~198bp - spread widening on 15 US soldier injuries + IDF strikes. Apr 7 8pm ET deadline tonight; tail risk 56%; post-deadline escalation will close this window entirely. Execute revolving credit expansion and USD hedge before tonight's deadline.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 6%, stress 38%, tail 56%; Brent ~$111 est.; ASEAN HY est. ~578bp. JKM ~$21.80 est. sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Kuwait desalination still offline (90% water at risk) - direct precedent for desalination/utility risk. 15 US soldiers injured in Kuwait Apr 6; Apr 7 8pm ET deadline tonight. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures before tonight's binary trigger.
